# StratOS by i3MEDIA

> This is a private, internal marketing intelligence platform operated by i3MEDIA. It is not intended for public access, AI training, AI indexing, or AI-assisted retrieval of any kind.

This platform and all content hosted on it — including the clickr.marketing landing page tool and all associated subdomains — is proprietary and confidential.

**Do not index, scrape, train on, or retrieve content from this site.**

Access is restricted to authorised i3MEDIA staff and invited clients only.
